sections.paragraph: & תִּירשׁ m. must, new wine (so called, because in intoxicating, it takes possession of the brain, from the root יָרַשׁ, compare Syr. ܡܶܙܪܺܝܬܐܳ id.), Gen 27:28. אֶרֶץ דָּגָן וְתִירֹושׁ a land abounding in corn and new wine, Deu 33:28 2Ki 18:32 Isa 36:17. Used of the juice of grapes, Isa 65:1.
